name: Carrot Vichyssoise
recipeIngredient: 2 cups green onion - without tops, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. This recipe is easy to make and excellent served hot or cold. Ensure your blender can handle hot liquids, or use a one-piece blender made by Braum or another manufacturer.
2. Heat the chicken broth; set aside and keep warm.
3. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and sauté for 5 minutes until softened, stirring occasionally.
4. Gradually add flour to the onions while whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
5. Gradually add hot broth to the pan, stirring constantly until well combined. Bring to a boil.
6. Gradually stir in carrot slices, salt, and white pepper into the boiling mixture. Simmer for 30 minutes or until carrots are tender.
7. Puree the soup using an immersion blender or transfer to a regular blender in batches, processing until smooth.
8. Stir in sour cream until well combined.
9. Serve hot or cold; garnish with additional sour cream and chopped chives.
